title: ranunculus clavulifer
intro: Ranunculus clavulifer, also known as the lesser spearwort, is a plant species belonging to the buttercup family, Ranunculaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. Ranunculus clavulifer is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and it has been used as an expectorant to help relieve coughs and congestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
